summary: Prithu, a climate‑tech startup building a full‑stack carbon removal platform for regenerative agriculture, raised Rs 10 crore in a seed round led by Transition VC to expand farmer networks and blockchain‑based MRV systems.

Vikra Ocean Tech, a deeptech startup developing modular ocean robotics, raised $1 million in a seed round co-led by Finvolve and India Accelerator to scale manufacturing and sales for defence and public sector applications.
Battery Smart secured $15 million in debt financing from Mirova to expand its battery-as-a-service network for electric vehicles across urban and semi-urban markets.

summary: Mojro Technologies, an AI-driven B2B{SaaS} logistics optimization startup, raised $5.5 million in a Series A round, including a $3 million investment led by IAN Alpha Fund, participation from 1Crowd, and a $2.5 million extension from Dallas Venture Capital.

summary: Novio, a fintech startup offering credit cards backed by fixed deposits, raised Rs 100 crore in a Series A round led by Cornerstone Ventures, with participation from several investors and venture debt providers. The funds will be used to expand distribution, strengthen bank partnerships, and enhance its product stack.

STCH, a Bengaluru-based textile tech startup, raised $5.5 million in a pre-Series A round led by Omnivore, with participation from Kae Capital and WVC, to expand its AI-driven fabric R&D and manufacturing platform.

TraqCheck, a HR tech startup, raised $8 million in a Series A round led by IvyCap Ventures with participation from IIFL Fintech Fund to expand its AI‑driven background screening and sourcing agents in Europe.

Pluckk, a digital-first fresh food and clean-label FMCG brand, raised Rs 100 crore in a Series A round led by Euro Gulf Investment to expand offline retail, enter international markets, and enhance its AI-driven supply chain.
Demi-fine jewellery startup Palmonas raised $40 million in a Series B round, led by Xponentia Capital with participation from Vertex Ventures.
